title: Transfer register
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:TransferRegister.jpg|thumb|A transfer register]]The '''transfer register''' was a device that documented transactions—whether for [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] or bartering—for a business. The transfer register recorded the thumbprints of buyers and sellers to officiate the transaction.

A blank transfer register could be very valuable for certain people, especially [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]].

{{Tech-stub}}

*''[[Star Wars: Yoda Stories]]'' {{Nc}}
